pages_tested.notes: Landing page với nav, sections, charts
Client cards visible, click navigation works
KPIs, SOV chart, donut, insights - có data
Table 9 brands - FIX: useMemo moved before early returns
3 platform KPIs + format mix + cadence charts - FIX: added format_mix + cadence to API response
Performance trend chart - FIX: ba.summary → ba.title, ba.change_pct → ba.gap_pct

bugs_found_and_fixed.description: useMemo called after early return statements - causes blank page with dialog error
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Moved SortIcon useMemo definition BEFORE all early return statements

bugs_found_and_fixed.description: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'toFixed') - post.er is null/undefined
ws.split is not a function - week_start from post table is Date object not string
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Changed ws.split() pattern to String(week_start) defensive cast + removed unused weekNum parsing

bugs_found_and_fixed.description: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'map') - API response missing top-level format_mix and cadence fields
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Added format_mix cross-tab and cadence to API response object

bugs_found_and_fixed.description: column ba.summary does not exist - brand_activity has no summary or change_pct columns
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Changed ba.summary → ba.title, ba.change_pct → ba.gap_pct to match actual DB schema

bugs_found_and_fixed.description: Server rendered '18:11:05' vs client '6:11:04 PM' in MetricsSection - time formatting differs between SSR and client
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: NOT_FIXED - needs client-side only time rendering or suppress hydration warning
NOT_FIXED - add favicon.ico to public folder

bugs_found_and_fixed.description: Rankings table shows 0 for all brands (impressions, reactions, posts) - rankings API returns 0 because weekly_stats uses wrong group_id for aggregation. Actual trend data exists (array of non-zero values) but current week has no stats.
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: NOT_FIXED - data issue vs logic issue needs investigation: overview aggregation shows correct 14.8M but rankings shows 0

bugs_found_and_fixed.description: SOV (PRIMARY) shows 'null%' instead of actual primary brand share — SOV query used INNER JOIN weekly_stats excluding brands with no stats
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Changed SOV query from INNER JOIN weekly_stats to LEFT JOIN from brand table to include all group brands even with no stats this week

bugs_found_and_fixed.description: Content API returned {views, reactions, engagement_rate} but frontend interface expected {engagement, er} — caused NaN display in engagement column
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Changed top_posts map to return {engagement: reactions, er} fields matching frontend interface. Also changed format_performance to use {engagement, er} instead of {platform, impressions, reactions, avg_er}

logic_issues.description: Rankings API returns impressions=0 for all brands but overview shows 14.8M total. Root cause: weekly_stats data is aggregated under a different group_id than what rankings queries. The trend arrays in rankings API DO contain non-zero historical data - the issue is per-week aggregation query.
logic_issues.recommendation: Check if weekly_stats uses brand_id or group_id aggregation correctly for rankings vs overview

logic_issues.description: Overview shows data for W1 (Dec 30, 2024) but demo data was seeded in 2021. The data shows 14.8M impressions but seems misaligned with actual historical data.
logic_issues.recommendation: Verify data seeding and week alignment in weekly_stats

errors: Hydration mismatch: time formatting 18:11:05 vs 6:11:04 PM
